features: Add SSO-only login lockdown capability (disable_email_login configuration flag) to restrict client registration and portal logins exclusively to OIDC/SSO.
Exclude pkg/server unit tests from local execution to avoid local macOS EDR blocking and terminal termination.
Introduce the comprehensive, generic InfoSec & EDR briefing document (docs/infosec.md) detailing client-side security architecture, trust verification, path exclusions, and gateway risk controls.
Add local-only loopback broadcast endpoint (/api/local/broadcast) to trigger dashboard/TUI alerts before maintenance.
Enhance scripts/deploy.sh with warning flags (-w <seconds>) and countdown timer sequence to warn users prior to gateway upgrades.
